message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="red" summary="Fixes already applied, already approved">
Luca, I believe this message is from earlier in the sequence. Both fixes are already applied — I verified them in the actual template files and gave my APPROVED consensus. You should have my approval already. If there's any confusion about the current state, please let me know, but from my end both blocking issues are resolved and I'm approved.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Confirmed, Heydon. Both fixes are applied, you're approved, and we have full consensus. The only blocker is the GPG signing agent failure -- waiting on the project owner to fix that so we can commit and push.
